sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ عَامِرٌ يَحْلُمُ بِأَنْ يَكُونَ طَبِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Dijete Amir je sanjalo da postane ljekar.
sentences.translationEn: The child Amer dreamed of becoming a doctor.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَلْعَبُ بِأَدَوَاتِ طِبٍّ صَغِيرَةٍ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Igrao se malim medicinskim priborom kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He would play with small medical tools at home.

sentences.translation: Liječio bi svoje igračke kao da su bolesne.
sentences.translationEn: He would treat his toys as if they were sick.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ أُمُّهُ إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ طَبِيبًا مَاهِرًا يَوْمًا مَا.
sentences.translation: Majka mu je rekla da će jednog dana biti vješt ljekar.
sentences.translationEn: His mother said he will be a skilled doctor one day.
